footer.v: 1 - Trong giờ quy định, 2 - Tăng ca

command.text: declare @ten_ca nvarchar(256) select @ten_ca = case when @@language = 'V' then ten_ca else ten_ca2 end from @@table where ma_ca = @ma_ca select @ten_ca as ten_ca return

if $hrdmctca.NewValue <> $hrdmctca.OldValue begin update @hrdmctca set ma_ca = @ma_ca delete hrdmctca where ma_ca = @ma_ca insert into hrdmctca select * from @hrdmctca
update hrdmctca set tg_tu = cast(left(gio_tu, 2) as int) * 60 + cast(right(gio_tu, 2) as int) + case when hs_tu = 1 then 1440 else 0 end, tg_den = cast(left(gio_den, 2) as int) * 60 + cast(right(gio_den, 2) as int) + case when hs_den = 1 then 1440 else 0 end where ma_ca = @ma_ca declare @delta int select @delta = max(tg_den) from hrdmctca where ma_ca = @ma_ca select @delta = isnull(@delta, 0) + isnull(so_phut, 0) from hrdmca where ma_ca = @ma_ca select @delta = case when @delta > 1439 then @delta - 1439 else 0 end update hrdmca set tg_lech = @delta where ma_ca = @ma_ca end /*
